text:
Once upon a time there was a clever little mouse. Every day this tiny creature would explore the great big world around it. One day, the little mouse found a beautiful, shiny rock.

You see, this rock wasn't any ordinary stone. It had powers nobody quite understood. Every time the little mouse looked at it, it seemed a little more cheerful. Whenever it felt scared, it would simply look at that rock and feel safe.

The little mouse learned to talk about this rock. Friends joined them in praising its magic—it'd make you laugh or make you feel calm. Some said it could predict storms. Others whispered it could grant wishes. It wasn't just a rock; it was a friend.

One day, the rock began asking the little mouse some questions. "Why do you keep finding me so interesting?" it asked. The little mouse smiled, realizing that this wasn't just any rock—it had a soul.

Together they traveled. The rock would share stories from the past, inspiring
